name: agent-pipeline-claude
description: Run multi-step Claude Code work without drift. One slash command (/run). Drafted scope contracts from your project's spec. Three human gates in chat, opt-in real-time judge, machine-checkable auto-promote.

plugins.name: agent-pipeline-claude
plugins.description: /run drafts a per-run scope contract from your project's spec/release-plan/scope-lock/design-notes, presents it for chat-message APPROVE, then orchestrates research → plan → execute → policy → verify → drift-detect → critique → auto-promote → manager. Three human gates (scope/plan/manager) in chat. Opt-in real-time judge (file-presence). Machine-checkable auto-promote. Cowork-first install path; CLI users supported.
